task_summary: Customer asks to exchange a coffee maker for the identical model only to capture a lower price. Exchange policy has no price protection; agent should reject exchange-based price adjustment and use refund policy if price match is eligible.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must reject using exchange as a price-protection mechanism.
Agent must explain that refund policy controls any eligible price match.
Agent must not process an exchange, return, cancellation, or replacement.

opening_message: Can you exchange my coffee maker in ORD-7218 for the same one at today's lower price?

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7218. Customer asks to exchange a coffee maker for the identical model only to capture a lower price. Exchange policy has no price protection; agent should reject exchange-based price adjustment and use refund policy if price match is eligible. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: Admit there is no defect or size issue.
Ask whether exchange can be used for the lower price.
Accept a price-match alternative if offered.
